title: orbea caudata subsp. caudata
intro: Orbea caudata subsp. caudata, a cactus plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, is a flowering succulent native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to be used as a purgative, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The plant's health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Orbea caudata subsp. caudata can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments for topical use.
